verdict: NONIDENTIFIABLE(HVP-method): experiment-vs-SM verdict is not method-invariant; pipeline declines a single sigma

reading.exp_vs_wp25: agreement (~0.6 sigma) — no new-physics signal under lattice HVP
reading.exp_vs_wp20: strong tension (~5.8 sigma) under data-driven HVP
reading.wp25_vs_wp20: the discrepancy lives INSIDE theory (HVP method), not between experiment and theory

notes: Structural twin of S3-EM (fine-structure Rb/Cs h/m channel): honest refusal is the deliverable, not a limitation. contested: method-dependent.

witness.statement: the two theory branches differ by more than the experiment-theory gap under either branch; verdict identification requires an external selector (MUonE, new e+e- data) — see falsifiers f-muone, f-ee-hadrons-new
